calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1. Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting And Recommended Distribution Of Funds 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs To Receiver 3) Exonerating All Bonds 4) Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions 5) Retaining Jurisdiction Regarding This Receivership Appointment
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elsa Horowitz, Esq. of Wolf, Rifkin, Shapiro, Schulman & Rabkin, LLP. (310-4781-4100) for Plaintiff Lone Oak Fund through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff advises the Court that a dismissal without prejudice will be filed as soon as an order is signed on this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER KEVIN SINGER's Motion For Order 1. Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting And Recommended Distribution Of Funds 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs To Receiver 3) Exonerating All Bonds 4) Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions 5) Retaining Jurisdiction Regarding This Receivership Appointment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Receivership
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elisa Horowitz Esq. of WRS S & R Law Offices for Plaintiff Lone Oak Fund, LLC.
Kevin Singer, (415-848-2984), Receiver is present.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Receivership is GRANTED as requested. Order is signed. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
